2604.18176.title: QuantumQA: Enhancing Scientific Reasoning via Physics-Consistent Dataset and Verification-Aware Reinforcement Learning
2604.18176.paper_summary: Large language models (LLMs) show strong capabilities in general reasoning but typically lack reliability in scientific domains like quantum mechanics, which demand strict adherence to physical constraints. This limitation arises from the scarcity of verifiable training resources and the inadequacy of coarse feedback signals in standard alignment paradigms. To address the data challenge, we introduce QuantumQA, a large-scale dataset constructed via a task-adaptive strategy and a hybrid verification protocol that combines deterministic solvers with semantic auditing to guarantee scientific rigor. Building on this foundation, we propose the verification-aware reward model (VRM) tailored for Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR), which employs an adaptive reward fusion (ARF) mechanism to dynamically integrate deterministic signals from a scientific execution suite (SES) with multidimensional semantic evaluations for precise supervision. Experimental results demonstrate that our method consistently outperforms baselines and general-purpose preference models. Notably, our optimized 8B model achieves performance competitive with proprietary models, validating that incorporating verifiable, rule-based feedback into the reinforcement learning loop offers a parameter-efficient alternative to pure scaling.
2604.18176.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）在一般推理方面展現出強大的能力，但在要求嚴格遵循物理約束的科學領域，如量子力學，通常缺乏可靠性。這一限制源於可驗證訓練資源的稀缺以及標準對齊範式中粗略反饋信號的不足。為了解決數據挑戰，我們引入了QuantumQA，這是一個通過任務適應策略和混合驗證協議構建的大規模數據集，該協議結合了確定性求解器和語義審核，以保證科學的嚴謹性。在此基礎上，我們提出了針對可驗證獎勵的強化學習（RLVR）量身定制的驗證感知獎勵模型（VRM），該模型採用自適應獎勵融合（ARF）機制，動態整合來自科學執行套件（SES）的確定性信號與多維語義評估，以實現精確的監督。實驗結果顯示，我們的方法在性能上始終超越基準和通用偏好模型。值得注意的是，我們優化的8B模型在性能上與專有模型相媲美，驗證了將可驗證的基於規則的反饋納入強化學習循環提供了一種參數高效的替代方案，而不僅僅是純粹的擴展。
2604.18176.author: Songxin Qu et.al.
2604.18176.authors: Songxin Qu, Tai-Ping Sun, Yun-Jie Wang, Huan-Yu Liu, Cheng Xue, Xiao-Fan Xu, Han Fang, Yang Yang, Yu-Chun Wu, Guo-Ping Guo, Zhao-Yun Chen
